name: Bug report

> Before filing: please skim [Troubleshooting](../../blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
> — most issues are the native Skydimo app holding the port, a missing Screen
> Recording permission, or the installation direction.

**What happened?**
A clear description of the problem and what you expected instead.

**Environment**
- macOS version: <!-- e.g. 14.5 -->
- Mac: <!-- Apple Silicon / Intel -->
- Aurora version: <!-- from the release / git tag -->

**Controller** (from *Open Aurora…* → device line at the bottom)
- Model + LEDs: <!-- e.g. SK0127 · 65 LEDs  — or "Preview only" if not detected -->
- Was the official Skydimo app fully quit? <!-- yes / no -->

**Mode**
- [ ] Circadian
- [ ] Screen Sync
- [ ] Music Sync
- [ ] Scene

**For wrong colors:** what color did the strip actually show for a red / green /
blue test?
